race.comment: CLUBHOUSE BRIDE (2) settled well back when 8 lengths from the winner in fifth over 1207m at this track last start, a less impressive effort than her fourth at this track the run before. Perfectly placed and is sure to take a ton of beating. MIZ CLUBCALI (11) improved sharply on her sixth two starts back at Santa Anita Turf (Turf) with success over 1207m at this track (Dirt) two-and-a-half weeks ago, getting home by a nose after being in the firing line on the corner. Looks well placed so expect another big run. ALOHA DREAMIN (1) has switched yards since finishing second two-and-a-half weeks ago over 1207m at this track. Has ability and makes plenty of appeal. LEGAL FICTION (3) was in the firing line on the turn and finished second last time over 1207m at this track (Dirt), beaten 3 lengths. Will trim down following recent racing. Placed to advantage and can run a bold race.
